posts.author: noxolos697 (Darshan Hiranandani )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello team,
Let me introduce myself Darshan Hiranandani, i am exploring options to integrate monday.com with ChatGPT. I’m curious about the steps involved in setting up this integration. Could someone please share their suggestions or recommended approach?

Specifically, I’d like to know how we can automate tasks or enhance our workflows using ChatGPT within the monday.com platform.

Looking forward to hearing your insights. Thank you!"

Regards
Darshan Hiranandani

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI Darshan Hiranandani

Welcome to the Community

We can setup Integrating Monday.com with ChatGPT is a fantastic idea to automate tasks and enhance your workflows. Here’s a recommended approach to get started like API Integration Utilize Monday.com’s API to interact with ChatGPT then Use Make.com or Zapier to automation workflows, you can create triggers for task updates, notifications, or new task creation based on interactions with ChatGPT, last one
Develop custom scripts to handle more complex tasks. you can use ChatGPT to generate task summaries, automate responses, or even create new tasks based on conversation data.
